name: WiamApp
pitch: WiamApp connects customers with verified skilled workers in their city — electricians, plumbers, cleaners, and more. Book in real time. Pay securely. Build trust.
features: Verified worker profiles and WiaMid identity
Spotlight, trust scores, and safety systems

name: WiamTrade
tagline: Trade crypto, forex, and African stocks — your keys, your funds.
pitch: WiamTrade is a non-custodial trading experience inside Telegram. Practice with $1M virtual on live charts, or connect your broker when you are ready for live trading.
features: Practice mode — crypto, forex, stocks (no broker keys required)
Live mode — connect Binance and more
Live charts and African currency display
